Description/Comment:RM LEVEL 7 OTHER The person in this role primarily supports sales activities from a technical perspective as well as deliver on technology projects. This person will design & deliver client solutions for a particular platform and should possess specialization & expertise in interfaces, components and design patterns used to develop cloud native platforms. Lead the platform implementation, offer both conceptual & practical solutions. Have a deep background in Java. Contribute to assets/offerings & thought leadership. Experience in messaging and integration technologies and components. Knowledge of event driven architecture, Messaging technologies. (e.g. JMS, RabbitMQ, SQS, AMQP etc). Have at least 10 years of experience in design and development of distributed software applications and cloud-native platforms. Primary Skills: Java, Spring, Cloud, Microservices, Rest API, AWS, Azure, Spring, SaaS, PaaS, Cloud Foundry, Kubernetes, API Gateway, API Engineering, NoSQL, JMS, Hadoop. Must demonstrate expertise in the following areas: 1) Cloud-Native Application Design and Architecture (Must be strong in this area): Actual experience in building cloud applications, Software as a Service (SaaS), Platform as a Service (PaaS, e.g. OpenShift, CloudFoundry) using at least one of the following IaaS platforms: AWS, MS Azure, Google Cloud. Knowledge of and experience in design of microservice-based solutions. Experience in designing load-balanced, auto-scalable, highly available, and secure architecture in cloud environment. API Managers/Gateways experience is a big plus. 2) Data Engineering & Analytics: Big Data technologies experience (Apache Spark, Hive/HDFS, NiFi). Machine Learning and/or Data Analytics platforms (Splunk, Pivotal Analytics, Kognito Analytics) 3) Development and Operations Engineering desired: Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment for large and small teams... Docker experience is a plus. 4) Other skills required to support sales activities: Good communicator and collaborator with customers and stakeholders -- Demonstrable experience in explaining problem space to the customers and working with them in building technical solution architecture. Build presentations and illustrations explaining complex concepts to the stakeholders. Selling Ideas and creative solutions. Experience with costing solutions or budgeting. Demonstrable leadership experience. Additional Job Details:Travel may be required up to 50% of the time and we prefer candidates interested in converting to an employee after 6 – 12 months. Residency: Green Card / US / HB1. For H1B candidates, he/she must meet “Client Hireable” requirements. This includes: * The candidate's I-140 has been approved * The candidate's I-485 has been pending with USCIS for at least 180 days * Candidate confirms he/she is interested in converting to an employee after 6 - 12 months. Once hired Client will cover the cost to file I-485 extensions only.

Immediate need for a Paralegal for a position in the Telecom Industry. This is 09+ month’s contract opportunity with long-term potential located in Moorestown, NJ. Please review the job description below: Job ID: 18-13680 Key Responsibilities and Technology Experience: Classify and prioritize incoming legal requests (Court Orders) related to copyright infringement; prepare associated Legal Response Center workflow tickets for processing utilizing a proprietary ticketing system. Perform independent analysis of business records and identify Client subscribers associated with formal legal requests; Prepare, package and mail, subscriber communication within defined timelines. Respond to requests from subscribers in regards to their records such as IP History, call records, data logs. Perform quality control, verification, and formal analysis of legal correspondence and independently decide if information conforms to corporate guidelines for release to the requesting agency or subscriber. Answer / Respond to subscriber phone calls related to company correspondence and legal processes associated copyright orders and subscriber identification. Create formal legal case folders for copyright orders while performing file maintenance and provide dispositions on copyright related legal cases. Conduct thorough and detailed research using a wide variety of systems including billing and technical provisioning tools. Communicate with customers via telephone or email to ensure the verification of customer identity prior to the release of information as well as to answer questions, concerns, and provide follow up till resolution Manage ticket queue to resolve, follow up, and update with customer requests. Regular, consistent and punctual attendance. Must be able to work nights and weekends, variable schedule(s) and overtime as necessary. Other duties and responsibilities as assigned. Our client is a leading Telecom Industry and we are currently interviewing to fill this and other similar contract positions. Qualified candidates should apply online for immediate consideration.

This is an Engineering Failure Analysis position focused on characterization. Responsible for technical functions in support of engineering activities such as characterization design, test, checkout, and modifications of substrate and related assembly technologies. Conducts engineering tests to collect data and assist in research work. Assignments are varied in nature and require a high degree of technical understanding of the substrate and assembly disciplines. Some degree of judgment required in resolving non-standard problems. Candidate will work closely with engineers in a collaborative environment. In this position, you will be responsible for working with the Yield Engineers to characterize new assembly and substrate technologies as well as determining the root cause of defects on both Products and Test Vehicles. Your responsibilities will include but not be limited to: o Visual/Mechanical defect analysis o Defect characterization by microscopic and analytical (spectroscopic) techniques o Yield Analysis o BKM Development, developing new analysis techniques for cutting edge substrate technologies Qualifications o Master degree or higher in Chemistry (organic, polymer), Material Science or a similar technical discipline. o Prior experience working in a lab environment o Experience with analysis techniques such as, FTIR, Raman, SEM, EDX, AFM, TOF-SIMS, XPS, TEM, GCMS and Optical Inspection, Ion Milling, FIB and X-section o Knowledge of failure analysis techniques o Ability to communicate findings verbally and through reports to yield engineers, LYA analysts, and other customers o Ability to work in a collaborative manner with a variety of different individuals in a fast paced, technical environment o Ability to work effectively in an ambiguous environment where changing priorities are the norm

Description With a focus on biotechnology laboratory automation, this individual will create automated workflows and stand-alone automated pipetting methods. The qualifying individual will be required to lead and/or assist in designing and executing automation protocols as well as the interpretation of laboratory results and managing of hardware malfunctions. Experience with sample preparation techniques, trouble shooting skills, and programing is required. This individual will work under moderate supervision as a member of the site laboratory automation team. As a result, exemplary communication and inter-personal skills are required. Experience programing liquid handlers is required. Following are the job functions involved with this position: This is a hands-on laboratory position (light lifting, bending, reaching and pipetting expected). Programing liquid handlers including Agilent Bravo (Vworks) and Hamilton Vantage (Venus on Vantage). Colony picking. Develop and validate methods for the above liquid handling systems. Programing scheduling software (Genera). Utilize existing and implement new automated protocols. Clearly communicate project status using email, conversation and presentations. Facilitate the transfer of automated protocols and provide subsequent automation support as needed. Required: PhD/MS in a scientific or engineering discipline with 4 years industrial experience; -OR- BS with 8 years laboratory automation experience. Serious safety focus, attention to detail, problem solving, and decision-making skills. Strong written and verbal communication and presentation skills. Ability to work on multi-discipline team. Creative problem-solving skills. Programing, maintenance and troubleshooting experience with liquid handling systems. Ability to establish priorities while maintaining flexibility in a dynamic environment. Preferred: Competent programing skills for Hamilton’s Vantage using Venus on Vantage. Advanced programing ability for the Agilent’s Bravo using Vworks. Experience with Retisoft’s Genera scheduler. Integration of automated liquid handlers with supporting equipment experience. Intense organizational skills and ability to keep multiple projects moving forward at the same time.

RESPONSIBILITIES:- Responsible for definition, design, construction, integration, testing, and support of reliable and reusable software solutions, addressing business opportunities. - Includes systems analysis, creation of specifications, coding, testing, and implementation of application programs and data interfaces.- Includes Java, JSP, J2EE, JDBC, EJB, JavaScript, C , Visual Basic, COM, DCOM, ActiveX, ASP, HTML, DHTML, XML, ColdFusion, Visual Age, WebSphere, .NET, etc.- Works with general supervision and follows established proceduresSKILLS/EXPERIENCE:- 1-3 years experience with Financial Services clients REQUIRED- 1-3 years experience with Salesforce.com development REQUIRED- Salesforce.com developer certification REQUIRED- Limited BSA experience (Data and Systems analysis) preferred- Understanding of the quality assurance and testing phases of projects- General knowledge of pertinent technologies- Basic skills in object, data, and / or process modeling, business process design (1-2 yrs.) - Understanding of Lean/Agile methodologies- Provides clear concise communication with project team members- Exposure to working with third parties and suppliers - , Experience not requiredADDITIONAL INFORMATION:- Need certified Salesforce.com developer for position in Northern Virginia Office- Need person willing/able to possibly convert to an associate after 3-month trial period- Person will need to be willing to ride the , shuttle to Richmond 2-4 times/month to meet with the extended team for Agile Planning sessions, etc.- Phone interview only- Person needs to be located in Northern VA no flexibility in location- No flexibility in rate card- Manager will be reviewing only a few resumes at a time
